name: io.github.luisgf/infrabroker
description: SSH & Kubernetes access broker for AI agents. Per-operation ephemeral credentials (SSH certificates, bound SA tokens) minted by a separate signer; per-command policy, approvals, chained audit. The model never touches a credential.

packageArguments.name: -config
packageArguments.description: Path to the broker config.json (hosts, signer endpoint or local CA, policy).
